properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded secret key used to sign and verify JWTs. Must decode to at least 32 bytes.

properties.name: jwt.customer-expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT validity duration for customers in milliseconds. Default is 900000 (15 minutes).

properties.name: jwt.employee-expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT validity duration for employees in milliseconds. Default is 7200000 (2 hours).
